tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating prediabetes, and a borderline high chloride level. Glucose, renal function (urea, creatinine), electrolytes, and calcium are within normal limits. No acute abnormalities detected, but recommend monitoring glycemic control and considering lifestyle interventions to prevent progression to diabetes.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
